title: Decadent Knafeh Cheesecake
description: A unique Japanese-inspired twist on traditional cheesecake, featuring the rich flavors of knafeh.
instructions: Prepare knafeh crust by layering phyllo dough in a 9-inch springform pan.
Mix cream cheese and granulated sugar in a large bowl until smooth.
Beat in eggs one at a time, followed by heavy cream and melted butter.
Stir in rose water, if using.
Pour cheesecake batter into prepared phyllo crust.
Bake for 45-50 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Let cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.
